title: dolichos fragrans
intro: Dolichos fragrans, also known as the fragrant dolichos or fragrant bean, is a climbing legume native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dolichos fragrans include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of Dolichos fragrans can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
